name: validate-source-file: each rule in rules: array validates against §2.1 schema; first failing rule reports the missing field
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > file.yaml
